## Summary
What is being changed?

## Target files
Which files are touched?

## Expected result
What should be true after this change?

## Verification
How was this checked?
- lint
- build
- browser/manual check
- other

## Risk note
What could break or what should be watched?

## Output format used
Choose one:
- before/after
- exact insertion point
- full file

## Scope check
- [ ] No unrelated files were changed
- [ ] No schema or migration changes were included without approval
- [ ] No secret or env handling was changed without approval
- [ ] Recommendation flow was checked if affected
- [ ] Save / compare / detail flow was checked if affected
